display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bronze: raw.csv
Purpose: raw source snapshot

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Silver: transactions_line_items
Purpose: cleaned transaction line items
PK: invoice_id, item_id, event_ts

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gold: interaction_events
Purpose: positive user-item interactions
PK: user_id, item_id, event_ts, invoice_id

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gold: user_item_splits
Purpose: train/val/test split assignments
PK: user_id, item_id, event_ts, invoice_id, split_version, split

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gold: user_features_asof
Purpose: point-in-time user features
PK: user_id, as_of_date

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gold: labels
Purpose: future-window outcomes per user/date
PK: user_id, as_of_date, label_name

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gold: uplift_train_dataset
Purpose: model-ready uplift training dataset
PK: user_id, as_of_date

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Notes:
1) PK lines are high-level key columns only; full PK/schema is in docs/feature_store/data_dictionary.md.
2) Key control columns:
- as_of_date: point-in-time uplift snapshot key
- split: recommender train/val/test partition key
- split_version: split-strategy version key
